subcodes.first_line: Verily, We make mention of those who have turned unto the Countenance and held fast unto the Most Firm Handle, and We remember them in this Prison [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا ذکرنا الذین اقبلوا الی الوجه و تمسکوا بالعروه الوثقی و نذکرهم فیهذا السجن
subcodes.subjects: @two kinds of knowledge [ilm and irfan]; sight and insight, @firmness in the Covenant, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
